system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You lash out at foes with your fingers in a series of raking strikes with such fury that it energizes the air around you. If you succeed on this attack, it knocks targets with less Qi Ranks than you prone and stuns them for a number of rounds equal to the difference in your Qi Ranks. On a Total Success, you send your opponents flying back, causing them to take Damage equal to your Waijia Rank. Cathartic: When done in this manner, your ferocious attacks create a visible shimmer in the air that protects you, negating the first Wound that round from any Attack. You also get one additional free Attack with the Mighty Paws of the Lion Technique.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: If target has fewer Qi Ranks, knocked prone and stunned for rounds equal to Qi Rank difference
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: As success, plus target is sent flying back and takes Damage equal to user's Waijia Rank
system.catharticEffect: When done in this manner, your ferocious attacks create a visible shimmer in the air that protects you, negating the first Wound that round from any Attack. You also get one additional free Attack with the Mighty Paws of the Lion Technique.
